---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How you think this could work.

## Type
- [ ] New stack profile (e.g., Kotlin, Swift)
- [ ] New specialist agent (e.g., accessibility, documentation)
- [ ] New integration (e.g., Windsurf, Copilot)
- [ ] Improvement to existing profile/agent
- [ ] New slash command
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context
Any examples, references, or mockups.
